data.description:
## Reproduction Steps

The `prompt-eval` GitHub Actions workflow runs the offline eval-discipline gate over every
packaged eval spec: it loads each `src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/*.eval.yaml` and calls
`rebar.llm.evals.eval.validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True)` for any dataset-bearing spec,
asserting no errors.

1. On `origin/main`, run the strict validator over the packaged specs (or push any commit and
   watch the `Prompt Eval` action).
2. Three advisory plan-review probe specs added 2026-07-18 carry a `dataset` but no `gold_set`:
   `plan-review-asserted-capability.eval.yaml` (d08f34847), `plan-review-decomp-shape.eval.yaml`
   (ce1989cb1), and `plan-review-necessity.eval.yaml` (cbc5b2880).
3. Strict validation returns `['strict: eval spec needs a non-empty gold_set (judge kappa alignment)']`;
   the CI step asserts and exits 1 -> the `prompt-eval` job is red on main. (The assert names only
   the first offender in glob order, decomp-shape, but all three are non-compliant.)

**Expected:** every packaged dataset-bearing eval spec passes strict validation; `prompt-eval` green.
**Actual:** the three specs above fail strict validation for a missing `gold_set`.

This is the same defect class as bug 1e80 (plan-review-g7), which was fixed the same way.

## Scope

Only the three eval spec YAML files. Add a non-empty, balanced `gold_set` of `{input, label}`
human-gold entries (label in `finding`/`pass`) to each, mirroring each spec's existing dataset
scenarios and the convention used by `plan-review-container.eval.yaml`. No code changes.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Each of the three specs has a non-empty `gold_set`; each entry has an `input` and a `label` (`finding`|`pass`).
- [ ] Each gold_set is balanced (>=1 `finding` and >=1 `pass` gold label), faithful to that spec's dataset.
- [ ] `validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True)` returns no errors for all dataset-bearing packaged specs.
- [ ] The offline eval-discipline test suite passes; the `Prompt Eval` action is green.
data.title: prompt-eval CI red on main: three advisory plan-review specs missing gold_set
